data.body:
“You didn’t heal him?”

“He didn’t have enough stamina. He’s lost weight, Shouta. He barely has enough energy to keep his eyes open.”

Shouta stands. “Is he asleep?”

“Not yet. He refused to sleep until he talked with you.”
data.author: did:plc:vyhlsfbrgdam2l5jdafhlkpw

data.body: “She’s right, Bakugou,” Shouta says, coming to stand next to her. Bakugou huffs, stuffing a piece of chicken in his mouth. Shouta examines him, happy to see that he looks /slightly/ better at least. “After your heat, maybe, but right now is out of the question.”
data.author: did:plc:vyhlsfbrgdam2l5jdafhlkpw

data.body:
He’s not sure how well Bakugou would respond to it, though.

Shouta releases a soft vanilla scent, letting Bakugou breathe it in for a few minutes before he asks. “Can I touch you?”

Bakugou blinks at him, then squints his eyes in suspicion. He slowly nods.
data.author: did:plc:vyhlsfbrgdam2l5jdafhlkpw

data.body:
“You were keeping yourself safe.” Shouta soothes.

“Lotta good that did me.” Bakugou says sarcastically. He takes a deep breath. “Everything was fine at first. Deku was all nervous and shit, acting like such a fucking dork that I could keep myself out of my head.

“I needed to hear it from you, too. It will help me get a feel for how I should handle your heat next week.”

“Still can’t believe you’re really doing that.”

Shout shrugs. “It’s what needs to be done. I have little faith that anyone your age can deal with this as well as I could.”
